---
name: New framework
about: Request or contribute support for a new framework
title: '[framework] Add <name> support'
labels: framework
assignees: ''
---

## Framework

Name and link to the framework's official site.

## Why it belongs in Right Away

Who uses it and what problem does it solve? Is it widely adopted?

## Proposed file structure

What should the generated project look like? Paste a file tree.

## Base dependencies

What npm packages go in `dependencies` and `devDependencies`?

## Default scripts

What `package.json` scripts should be generated?

## Are you willing to implement this?

- [ ] Yes, I'll open a PR
- [ ] No, just requesting
